name: Montana Sourdough Doughnuts
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Oil or 1 tablespoon Lard, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs and sugar together until well combined.
2. Add sourdough starter, buttermilk, oil or melted lard, and sifted dry ingredients to the egg mixture. Mix until a smooth dough forms.
3. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead until smooth.
4. Roll the dough to a thickness of 1/2 inch (≤) and cut into doughnut shapes using a 2-3/4-inch doughnut cutter.
5. Place the doughnuts on a greased baking sheet and let rise for 30 minutes.
6. Fry the doughnuts in hot, deep fat (370°F) until golden brown and cooked through.
7. Roll the fried doughnuts in sugar before serving.
Makes about 3 dozen.
